name: Daniel (w1wd) |Sick Days|
description:
📭-Not Requested

❣️Note:❣️NO, I did not make this during my break ☝️🤓 I had this saved in my drafts and kinda kept it on hold for a while so here’s a meal for my Daniel lovers <3

✍️11 Paragraphs Long✍️

♥️🔳🄿🅻🅞🆃 🅘🅽🅃🅡ⓞ🔳♥️

Yesterday was the day that Daniel planed to kidnap you. He had gotten you two closer connected, perfectly corrected your route to find out when was the best time to sweep you away to his house for 'a date', and the rest was planned out once you got to his house.

That was the plan… until he got sick throughout the day. Now here he was laying in his bed, letting you take care of him since he was basically your only ride out of the woods. But even with you in the same house as him he couldn’t stand being away from you. So, he went to find you for some… cuddles?

Art by: @TortillaTHarina (Twitter)

⚠️WARNING⚠️
